creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 170876
patch with update to 5.3.4

Hello,

attached a patch to update the port to its current version. Buildtests are fine for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. portlint is also fine.

I removed the ignore php5-* clause since there is no php5- left in the portstree.

Greetings,
Torsten
